submitted_payload.name: Ralph Workflow
submitted_payload.description: Open-source workflow for planning, running, verifying, and reviewing one real coding task without babysitting the agent.
submitted_payload.author: Ralph Workflow
submitted_payload.content:
Codeberg is the primary repo. GitHub is only the mirror.

This is a workflow layer for substantial, well-specified software engineering on your own machine. It is built around a simple loop: write one clear task contract, run the agent on a real repo, inspect the resulting diff, and judge it by explicit checks instead of transcript quality.

Suggested first-run contract:
- Change: what should change
- Keep unchanged: what must stay stable
- Done means: observable outcome
- Checks: tests, lint, build, screenshots, or other verification

Good fit:
- one bounded feature slice
- one isolated refactor with tests
- one integration point with a visible finish line

Bad fit:
- tiny edits where setup dominates
- vague exploration
- risky production surgery

Start with START_HERE.md, then the first-task guide.

verification.execution_method: Direct JSON POST to Claude Stack's public /api/submit endpoint discovered from the live submit page bundle.

why_this_action: The active bottleneck is still distribution_and_message_to_primary_repo_conversion, but recent same-family directory and curator bursts are already in measurement windows.
Claude Stack is a higher-intent Claude Code workflow surface than another broad AI-tools directory, so the audience is closer to Ralph Workflow's strongest adoption story.
Its submit flow was live and executable right now through a public JSON endpoint, making this a real external action instead of another prep artifact.
The payload keeps Codeberg first by pointing the main URL at the START_HERE entry on Codeberg and keeping GitHub as mirror-only context.
expected_outcome: Qualified Claude Code users discover Ralph Workflow as a workflow resource and land on the Codeberg-first START_HERE path instead of a generic repo mirror.
replacement_condition: If there is no live Claude Stack entry or referral evidence by 2026-06-07, treat it as pending-only and move the next fresh-action slot to another executable high-intent workflow/comparison surface instead of repeating the same submission family.
